title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Goibibo Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Goibibo Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Goibibo Hotels in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Goibibo Hotels:
Goibibo Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo Hotels!
